notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

copyright.title: All rights reserved
copyright.subtitle: All rights reserved
copyright.p1: All content on this website — including text, photos, graphics, logos, package descriptions and design — is the exclusive property of A1M Travel and is protected by copyright.
copyright.p2: Any reproduction, copying, distribution or use of content without prior written permission is prohibited. Infringement may result in legal action under Serbian and international law.

terms.title: Terms of use and legal notice
terms.warnBody: Unauthorized copying, reproduction, distribution or misuse of this website’s content may be subject to legal measures under applicable laws of the Republic of Serbia and international intellectual property rules.
terms.s1p: These Terms govern the relationship between the owner of the A1M Travel website and the user. By accessing or using the site, you accept these conditions.
terms.s2p: All content on this site is owned by A1M Travel or used under licence and is protected by copyright. Copying, commercial use, scraping or modification without consent is prohibited.
terms.s3p: Misuse may lead to cease-and-desist, damages, criminal complaints where applicable, and reporting to authorities.
terms.s4p: Bookings require a deposit (minimum 30%). Balance is due at least 14 days before departure. Prices are per person until confirmed and may change due to currency, fuel or hotel tariffs beyond our control.
terms.s5p: Cancellation policy: >30 days — 90% refund; 15–30 days — 70%; 7–14 days — 50%; <7 days — no refund. Force majeure follows applicable law.
terms.s6p: We strive for accurate information but are not liable for technical errors, force majeure changes, third-party services, or loss of baggage.
terms.s7p: Personal data is processed for bookings and services under Serbian law and GDPR. Data is not shared without consent; you may request access, correction or deletion.
terms.s8p: Serbian law applies. Courts in Serbia have jurisdiction unless parties agree otherwise.
terms.s9p: We may change these Terms at any time. Continued use after publication means acceptance.
terms.footer: Last updated: March 2025. Owner: Đorđe Milosavljević, Krupanj. Contact: A1Mtravel@email.com

about.heroSub: Your trusted partner for unforgettable travel
about.storyP1: A1M Travel was founded with one clear mission — to give every traveller an unforgettable experience without hassle. Our experts carefully select each package for quality, value and authenticity.
about.storyP2: Based in Loznica, we use decades of experience and a global partner network to offer exclusive deals you won’t find elsewhere — from Mediterranean beaches to Alpine ski runs and exotic Asia.
about.storyP3: We pride ourselves on transparent pricing, a personal approach and 24/7 support. Every traveller is a person whose dream holiday we take seriously.
about.officeSub: Comfortable space in central Loznica, ready for your travel dreams

letovanja.heroSub: Choose the perfect destination for your summer
letovanja.charterTitle: Charter flights from Belgrade and Niš
letovanja.charterBody: All foreign packages include direct charter flights. Departures from Belgrade (BEG) or Niš (INI). Bus departure may be available at a lower price.

zimovanja.heroSub: Skiing, adrenaline and winter magic at top resorts
zimovanja.bannerAbroadBody: For Slovenia and nearby destinations — comfortable bus from Loznica and Belgrade. For Austria, Italy and Switzerland — flight from Belgrade included in the package.
zimovanja.bannerSrbBody: All Serbia packages include comfortable bus from Loznica and Belgrade. No ticket hassle — everything is in the price.

izleti.heroSub: Discover hidden gems of Serbia and the region

hoteli.heroSub: A curated collection of the best hotel experiences on the planet
